title: phyllanthus sepialis
intro: Phyllanthus sepialis, also known as Airy Shaw's green leaf, is a type of plant belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus sepialis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
